outreach_subject: Re: A European angle after your claims-process piece

replies.subject: Re: A European angle after your claims-process piece
replies.body:
Hi Lisa,

Thanks for your email but it is a little too vague. Please feel free to share more details on what you’re suggesting.

Best,
Tim.

Timothy Schneider, Publisher
Palisadian-Post <https://palipost.com/>
310-849-8300
tim.schneider@palipost.com

Subscribe today to the Palisadian-Post <https://palipost.com/newsletter-signup/>

Please join us in supporting journalistic excellence in community news for Pacific Palisades <https://fundrazr.com/PalisadianPost?ref=cr_2EoFa5_ab_6jPWfCqVm2M6jPWfCqVm2M>

> On Jul 2, 2026, at 11:17 PM, Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> wrote:
> 
> Hello,
> 
> I know inboxes get away from all of us, so this may have slipped
> through last week. Wanted to flag one data point that might be
> relevant: LA County permits for noncombustible residential
> construction have risen sharply since 2025 — the line is starting to
> bend. Happy to share the underlying data in case useful for an
> upcoming piece.
> 
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Team
> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
replies.snippet: Hi Lisa, Thanks for your email but it is a little too vague. Please feel free to share more details on what you're suggesting. Best, Tim. Timothy Schneider, Publisher Palisadian-Post 310-849-8300
